list.name: Changes
list.comment:
This push contains a larger update for WhatABubble covering rendering, config handling, translation, and documentation.
Included changes: - improved speech bubble rendering and general bubble handling - own bubbles are only rendered in third person - bubbles are hidden while sneaking - Nine-Slice bubble rendering and custom bubble texture support extended - configurable bubble texture source, padding, and slice borders via JSON - settings now apply correctly on save and no longer require a manual refresh after joining a world - speech service initialization and reload flow improved - Vosk model loading now happens after entering a world/server and provides in-game status messages - added and improved Vosk hint handling for common Minecraft terms - received bubbles can be translated locally using LibreTranslate - improved local LibreTranslate startup/config handling - expanded configuration handling for microphone, colors, wrapping, debug mode, and translation - documentation was reworked and split into multiple English docs pages - README updated with a disclaimer that the project is still unfinished and used at your own risk
Docs added/updated: - docs/index.md - docs/setup.md - docs/model.md - docs/bubbles.md - docs/translation.md - docs/troubleshooting.md - README.md

task.summary:
This push contains a larger update for WhatABubble covering rendering, config handling, translation, and documentation.
Included changes: - improved speech bubble rendering and general bubble handling - own bubbles are only rendered in third person - bubbles are hidden while sneaking - Nine-Slice bubble rendering and custom bubble texture support extended - configurable bubble texture source, padding, and slice borders via JSON - settings now apply correctly on save and no longer require a manual refresh after joining a world - speech service initialization and reload flow improved - Vosk model loading now happens after entering a world/server and provides in-game status messages - added and improved Vosk hint handling for common Minecraft terms - received bubbles can be translated locally using LibreTranslate - improved local LibreTranslate startup/config handling - expanded configuration handling for microphone, colors, wrapping, debug mode, and translation - documentation was reworked and split into multiple English docs pages - README updated with a disclaimer that the project is still unfinished and used at your own risk
Docs added/updated: - docs/index.md - docs/setup.md - docs/model.md - docs/bubbles.md - docs/translation.md - docs/troubleshooting.md - README.md

MESSAGE.value:
This push contains a larger update for WhatABubble covering rendering, config handling, translation, and documentation.
Included changes: - improved speech bubble rendering and general bubble handling - own bubbles are only rendered in third person - bubbles are hidden while sneaking - Nine-Slice bubble rendering and custom bubble texture support extended - configurable bubble texture source, padding, and slice borders via JSON - settings now apply correctly on save and no longer require a manual refresh after joining a world - speech service initialization and reload flow improved - Vosk model loading now happens after entering a world/server and provides in-game status messages - added and improved Vosk hint handling for common Minecraft terms - received bubbles can be translated locally using LibreTranslate - improved local LibreTranslate startup/config handling - expanded configuration handling for microphone, colors, wrapping, debug mode, and translation - documentation was reworked and split into multiple English docs pages - README updated with a disclaimer that the project is still unfinished and used at your own risk
Docs added/updated: - docs/index.md - docs/setup.md - docs/model.md - docs/bubbles.md - docs/translation.md - docs/troubleshooting.md - README.md

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
This push contains a larger update for WhatABubble covering rendering, config handling, translation, and documentation.
Included changes: - improved speech bubble rendering and general bubble handling - own bubbles are only rendered in third person - bubbles are hidden while sneaking - Nine-Slice bubble rendering and custom bubble texture support extended - configurable bubble texture source, padding, and slice borders via JSON - settings now apply correctly on save and no longer require a manual refresh after joining a world - speech service initialization and reload flow improved - Vosk model loading now happens after entering a world/server and provides in-game status messages - added and improved Vosk hint handling for common Minecraft terms - received bubbles can be translated locally using LibreTranslate - improved local LibreTranslate startup/config handling - expanded configuration handling for microphone, colors, wrapping, debug mode, and translation - documentation was reworked and split into multiple English docs pages - README updated with a disclaimer that the project is still unfinished and used at your own risk
Docs added/updated: - docs/index.md - docs/setup.md - docs/model.md - docs/bubbles.md - docs/translation.md - docs/troubleshooting.md - README.md
